name: Agent Context
description: Render the full LLM context an agent would see on a fresh transition, without invoking the LLM. Returns the assembled system prompt, context entries with labels and sizes, tool list, caps, and outputs config. Use this to inspect and debug what an agent actually receives.

systemPrompt.description: Full system prompt text (identity + lattice reference + caps + session context)

contextEntries.description: Resolved context entries with labels and byte sizes

tools.description: Tool names available to the agent
